title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
description: Test that enabling the Remind Me toggle schedules a notification for user
preconditions: User has active trial with remaining days
User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 2. Locate the Remind Me toggle in Manage Trial section
5. Simulate time to 24 hours before trial end
6. Check if WhatsApp notification is triggered

expected_result: Toggle is saved as enabled and WhatsApp notification is sent 24 hours before trial expiry
